back_translation: The Lord spoke to Moses, saying,

And to the sons of Israel you shall say: Any man from the sons of Israel or from the foreigner who resides in Israel who gives any of his offspring to Molech shall surely be put to death. The people of the land shall stone him with stones.
And I will set My face against that man and cut him off from among his people, because he gave of his offspring to Molech, defiling My sanctuary and profaning My holy name.
And if the people of the land hide their eyes from that man, when he gives of his offspring to Molech, so as not to put him to death,
then I will set My face against that man and against his family, and I will cut off him and all who prostitute themselves after him to prostitute themselves with Molech from among their people.
And the soul that turns to mediums or to spiritists to prostitute himself after them—I will set My face against that soul and cut him off from among his people.
Consecrate yourselves and be holy, for I am the Lord your God.
And you shall keep My statutes and do them. I am the Lord who sanctifies you.
For any man who curses his father and his mother shall surely be put to death. His father and his mother he has cursed; his blood is upon him.
And a man who commits adultery with the wife of a man, who commits adultery with the wife of his neighbor—the adulterer and the adulteress shall surely be put to death.
And a man who lies with his father's wife has uncovered his father's nakedness. Both of them shall surely be put to death; their blood is upon them.
And a man who lies with his daughter-in-law—both of them shall surely be put to death. They have committed perversion; their blood is upon them.
And a man who lies with a male as with a woman—both of them have committed an abomination; they shall surely be put to death; their blood is upon them.
And a man who marries a woman and her mother—it is depravity. In fire they shall burn him and them, that there may be no depravity among you.
And a man who gives his emission to an animal shall surely be put to death, and you shall kill the animal.
And a woman who approaches any animal to mate with it—you shall kill the woman and the animal. They shall surely be put to death; their blood is upon them.

And a man who marries his sister, the daughter of his father or the daughter of his mother, and sees her nakedness, and she sees his nakedness—it is a disgrace. They shall be cut off before the eyes of the sons of their people. The nakedness of his sister he has uncovered; he shall bear his iniquity.

And a man who lies with a menstruating woman and uncovers her nakedness—he has exposed her source, and she has uncovered the source of her blood. Both of them shall be cut off from among their people.
And the nakedness of your mother's sister and your father's sister you shall not uncover, for he has exposed his own kin. They shall bear their iniquity.
And a man who lies with his uncle's wife has uncovered the nakedness of his uncle. They shall bear their sin; they shall die childless.
And a man who marries his brother's wife—it is impurity. He has uncovered the nakedness of his brother; they shall be childless.
And you shall keep all My statutes and all My judgments and do them, that the land where I am bringing you to live in it shall not vomit you out.
And you shall not walk in the statutes of the nation that I am driving out before you, for they did all these, and I abhorred them.
And I said to you: You shall inherit their land, and I will give it to you to possess it, a land flowing with milk and honey. I am the Lord your God, who has separated you from the peoples.

And you shall distinguish between the clean animal and the unclean, and between the unclean bird and the clean. And you shall not make your souls abominable by animal or by bird or by any creature that moves on the ground, which I have set apart for you as unclean.
And you shall be holy to Me, for holy am I, the Lord. And I have separated you from the peoples to be Mine.
And a man or woman in whom there is a medium or spiritist—they shall surely be put to death. They shall stone them with stones; their blood is upon them.
